title: Method, device and computer-readable medium for reducing signaling overhead and data latency
abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure relate to method, device and computer-readable medium for reducing signaling overheads and data latency. In accordance with embodiments of the present disclosure, terminal devices in a set of terminal device share resource control connections to the network device. The network device determines a terminal device from which the information is send based on an identifier of the terminal device in the received information. According to embodiments of the present disclosure, signaling overheads in data transmissions and latency of data transmissions are significantly reduced.
